facts.text: :root{--footer-height: calc(var(--unit) * 8)}footer{height:var(--footer-height);margin-top:calc(var(--unit) * 8);padding-top:calc(var(--unit) * 8);color:#0006}footer a[href]{color:inherit}r-grid.main .menu{height:calc(var(--unit) * 30)}.price,.count{font-feature-settings:"cv03","cv04"}.price.large{font-size:2em;font-weight:600}small,.small{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.005em}r-grid.main .menu>div.focus5 a:nth-child(6):hover{color:var(--accent-color)}:root{--field-height: calc(var(--unit) * 5);--field-corner-radius: 4px;--field-font-size: inherit;--field-label-height: calc(var(--unit) * 4);--field-radio-size: calc(var(--unit) * 2.5)}@media(max-width:640px){:root{--field-height: calc(var(--unit) * 6);--field-label-height: calc(var(--unit) * 6);--field-corner-radius: 4px;--field-font-size: 1.2em}}button,input,select{font:inherit;font-weight:500;font-size:var(--field-font-size)}button{flex:0 0 auto;border:none;color:#fff;background:#111;border-radius:var(--field-corner-radius);margin:0;padding:0 calc(var(--unit) * 1.5);height:var(--field-height);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}button:hover{background:var(--blue)}button>svg{max-height:40%;margin-right:calc(var(--unit) * .5)}button[disabled]{opacity:.7;pointer-events:none}button[disabled]:hover{background:inherit}select{line-height:16px;height:var(--field-height);box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-appearance:none;border:none;font-weight:500;padding:0 calc(var(--unit) * 3) 0 var(--unit);margin:0;border:2px solid black;border-radius:var(--field-corner-radius);background:transparent;background-image:url(//shop.rsms.me/cdn/shop/t/2/assets/popup-black.svg?v=158713476748806224631603069992);background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:right center;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}select option{font-family:var(--font-family),Inter}label.field{height:var(--field-label-height);display:flex;align-items:center;font-weight:500;font-size:var(--field-font-size)}input[type=radio]{-webkit-appearance:none;border:2px solid black;border-radius:50%;width:var(--field-radio-size);height:var(--field-radio-size);box-sizing:border-box;margin:0 var(--unit) 0 0}input[type=radio].checked{background:#000;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px #fff}.sold-out{opacity:.3}a.cart{display:flex;align-items:center;font-weight:450;color:inherit}a.cart:hover{text-decoration:none;color:var(--hot-orange)}.cart .icon{flex:0 0 auto;width:calc(var(--unit) * 2);margin-right:var(--unit)}.cart .count{color:#fff;background:var(--hot-orange);border-radius:50%;--size: calc(var(--unit) * 2.5);width:var(--size);height:var(--size);line-height:var(--size);font-size:.8em;font-weight:600;text-align:center;margin-left:calc(var(--unit) * .75)}.cart.empty .count{visibility:hidden}.powered-by-link a{color:inherit;opacity:.3;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.005em}.powered-by-link:hover a{opacity:1}.product-main img{margin:0}.description.secondary{margin-top:var(--line-height)}.variants{display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin-bottom:var(--line-height)}.offers{margin-top:calc(var(--line-height)*1.5)}.price-info .meta{opacity:.5}.add-to-cart{display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin-bottom:calc(var(--unit) * 4)}.add-to-cart select{flex-grow:1;max-width:calc(var(--unit) * 40);margin-bottom:calc(var(--unit) * 2)}.add-to-cart button{flex:0 0 auto}@media(max-width:640px){.product-main img{max-height:50vh;width:100%}.add-to-cart{flex-direction:column}.add-to-cart select{width:100%;max-width:100%;margin:0 0 20px}.add-to-cart button{width:100%;margin:0}}.product-grid-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-width:calc(var(--unit) * 64)}.product-grid-item .image img{display:block}.product-grid-item .info{color:inherit;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-sizing:border-box;padding-top:calc(var(--unit) * 1.5)}.product-grid-item .info:hover{text-decoration:none}.product-grid-item .info h4{display:block;flex-grow:1;margin:0 var(--unit) 0 0;font-weight:500}.product-grid-item .info .price{flex:0 0 auto;font-weight:500;opacity:.5;margin-top:calc(var(--unit) * .5)}.tiles{--minTileWidth: 80px;--aspectRatio: 1/1;--fontSizeS: 11px;--fontSizeM: 13px;--fontSizeL: 14px;--borderWidth: 1px;--borderOpacity: .2;--avatarSize: 24px;--metaHeightBase: 24px;--metaHeightExtra: 24px;--propertiesBarHeight: 72px;--row-gap: calc(var(--unit) * 2);--column-gap: var(--row-gap)}.tiles .tile{background:#eee;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}.tiles .tile .art{background-size:cover}.tiles .tile.selected{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--blue)}.tiles .tile.selected .art{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 4px var(--background-color)}r-cell.cart .description{display:flex;flex-direction:column}r-cell.cart .description a.title{color:inherit}r-cell.cart .description h3{margin-top:0;line-height:1;font-size:1.25em;font-weight:600}r-cell.cart .description h4{color:var(--foreground-color);font-weight:500}r-cell.cart r-cell.price{text-align:right;line-height:1;font-size:1.25em;font-weight:600}r-cell.cart select.quantity{margin-top:var(--unit)}r-grid.cart-list{--row-gap: var(--line-height);--column-gap: var(--line-height)}r-grid.cart-list hr{margin:0}r-grid.cart-list hr:first-child{margin-top:var(--unit)}r-cell.cart .price.total{display:flex;flex-direction:column}r-cell.cart .price.total>*{margin-bottom:calc(var(--unit) * 2)}r-cell.cart button[type=submit]{margin-top:var(--unit);margin-bottom:calc(var(--unit) * 2)}@media(max-width:640px){r-grid.cart-list{padding-bottom:var(--line-height);border-bottom:2px solid black}r-cell.cart .price.total{flex-direction:row}r-cell.cart .price.total .price{flex-grow:1;text-align:right}r-cell.cart button[type=submit]{width:100%}} /*# sourceMappingURL=/cdn/shop/t/2/assets/rsms-shop.css.map?v=126128873999704611301759260384 */
